enrichment.summary: Kyle compares alcohol and weed, arguing weed is the superior substance. He covers differences in social behavior, health, cost, and naturalness, ultimately recommending weed over alcohol for daily use.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Alcohol is more social; weed makes you overthink around others
Weed is healthier than alcohol; alcohol damages the liver
Weed is significantly cheaper than alcohol for equivalent effect
Weed is natural and therefore safer; alcohol is a human-manufactured product
Weed can be used chronically without the physical damage alcohol causes
Alcohol may actually aid communication better than weed since weed makes it hard to find words
Weed doesn't have to be a gateway drug; he substitutes extra weed for alcohol
